title: quercus salicina var. orgyalis
intro: Quercus salicina var. orgyalis, also known as the Japanese evergreen oak, is a variety of the Quercus salicina plant, a deciduous tree native to East Asia. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Quercus salicina var. orgyalis include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
